formal_policy.graphs: only frozen downloads from graph-owner official distribution endpoints
formal_policy.source_queries: use the official source collection when available
formal_policy.synthetic_queries: rerun the cited protocol with fixed seeds before any solver timing
formal_policy.query_validity: retain only queries for which one connected component intersects every group; audit excluded source rows before timing
formal_policy.author_artifacts: engineering audit only; excluded from paper timing tables
formal_policy.same_name_graphs: never merge snapshots; use source-and-snapshot-qualified dataset names

correctness_gate_dependencies.name: GroupSteinerTree / Basic+
correctness_gate_dependencies.redistribution_note: upstream repository has no repository-level license file; acquisition metadata is published instead of vendoring it

correctness_gate_dependencies.name: SCIP-Jack in SCIP 7.0.3
correctness_gate_dependencies.use: known-optimum gate only, never a large-graph runtime baseline

reporting_requirements: CPU model, physical cores, RAM, OS, compiler and build type
one compute thread per solver process; monitoring thread is measurement-only
wall-clock time includes solver preprocessing after graph load and excludes one shared graph load only when all methods use the same convention
per-query 10000-second timeout, timeout counted as timeout rather than imputed runtime
peak RSS, solved count, timeout count, objective value and optimality agreement
